name: io.github.atomno-mcp/mcp-newbuild
description: Check Russian new-build developers and projects from the official ЕИСЖС/наш.дом.рф data (214-ФЗ): developer profile, project declaration, escrow scheme, construction permit with deadline-shift history, catalogue of buildings under construction, and a deterministic developer risk summary (advisory).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_NEWBUILD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key (Pro tier) for developer, declaration, escrow, permit, search and risk-summary lookups via the ЕИСЖС/наш.дом.рф hosted backend.
